label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. I need to figure out which present Eve ends up with after all the swaps. Let me start by keeping track of each person's gift after each exchange. Let me write down the initial gifts first. Initial gifts: - Alice: green present - Bob: white present - Claire: black ball - Dave: orange ball - Eve: yellow present Now, the swaps happen in a sequence. Let me go step by step. First swap: Bob and Alice swap their gifts. After this swap: - Alice now has Bob's original gift, which is white present. - Bob now has Alice's original gift, which is green present. So: Alice: white Bob: green Claire: black Dave: orange Eve: yellow Second swap: Alice and Eve swap their gifts. After this, Alice gives her current gift (white) to Eve, and takes Eve's current gift (yellow). So: Alice: yellow Eve: white Others remain the same: Bob: green Claire: black Dave: orange Third swap: Claire and Eve swap their gifts. Claire has black ball, Eve has white present. After swapping: Claire: white Eve: black Others: Alice: yellow Bob: green Dave: orange Fourth swap: Alice and Dave swap their gifts. Alice has yellow, Dave has orange. After swapping: Alice: orange Dave: yellow Others: Bob: green Claire: white Eve: black Fifth
